name: tests-run
title: Tests / Run
description: Execute Unity tests and return detailed results. Supports filtering by test mode, assembly, namespace, class, and method. Recommended to use 'EditMode' for faster iteration during development.

parameters.name: testMode
parameters.description: Test mode to run. Options: 'EditMode', 'PlayMode'. Default: 'EditMode' Values: [EditMode, PlayMode]

parameters.name: testAssembly
parameters.description: Specific test assembly name to run (optional). Example: 'Assembly-CSharp-Editor-testable'

parameters.name: testNamespace
parameters.description: Specific test namespace to run (optional). Example: 'MyTestNamespace'

parameters.name: testClass
parameters.description: Specific test class name to run (optional). Example: 'MyTestClass'

parameters.name: testMethod
parameters.description: Specific fully qualified test method to run (optional). Example: 'MyTestNamespace.FixtureName.TestName'

parameters.name: includePassingTests
parameters.description: Include details for all tests, both passing and failing (default: false). If you just need details for failing tests, set to false.

parameters.name: includeMessages
parameters.description: Include test result messages in the test results (default: true). If you just need pass/fail status, set to false.

parameters.name: includeStacktrace
parameters.description: Include stack traces in the test results (default: false).

parameters.name: includeLogs
parameters.description: Include console logs in the test results (default: false).

parameters.name: logType
parameters.description: Log type filter for console logs. Options: 'Log', 'Warning', 'Assert', 'Error', 'Exception'. (default: 'Warning') Values: [Error, Warning, Log]

parameters.name: includeLogsStacktrace
parameters.description: Include stack traces for console logs in the test results (default: false). This is huge amount of data, use only if really needed.
